chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 458 of 2017 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.2903/2017. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.03.2026 Mr. Saleem Raza, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant. Matter is pending since 2017 without any progress. Even notice has not been sought / issued till date. On 04.03.2020, following order was passed: “04.03.2020 Mr. Fahad Ali, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for applicant, who is reportedly busy before another bench and request for adjournment. Adjourned.” On 01.11.2023, following order was passed: “01.11.2023 Dr. Shah Nawaz, Advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel for the applicant seeks time. Adjourned.” Even today time is sought on behalf of applicant for no cogent reason. It appears that the applicant is not interested in the present proceedings. Accordingly, in view of judgment of CIR vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, the reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
